_note: MOCK coverage ruleset for a synthetic PoC. Fictional payer. Not a real medical policy. Edit freely.

exclusions.reason: Cosmetic/elective eyelid surgery (blepharoplasty) is excluded unless functional visual impairment is documented and pre-approved under a separate medical-necessity pathway.

criteria: Documentation of at least 6 weeks of conservative therapy (e.g., physical therapy and/or NSAIDs)
A documented neurologic deficit or radiculopathy red-flag finding (e.g., motor weakness, foot drop, progressive symptoms)
Documented focal neurologic findings or failure of initial outpatient workup
